resources.string: Sign in to your teacher account
Already have an account? Sign In
No class yet — tap Open students to add one.
Search by name or roll no…
Tap here to send key request.
Touch here to know how to fill data.
Use QUESTION MARK on each page to get familiar with things.
Are you sure you want to delete class %1$s? All student allocations in this class will be cleared.
This section will be available in the next update.
Tap a class (Std 1–12) to activate. Details show below.
No classes yet. Add a class from the Home tab.
Are you sure you want to logout?
No new messages from the administrator.
Select standard remarks from the predefined list or add your own custom remarks for each subject.
प्रत्येक महिन्याचे हजर दिवस व एकूण कामकाजी दिवस भरा.
या वर्गासाठी कोणतेही विषय निवडलेले नाहीत. कृपया प्रथम \'विषय\' मेनूवर जाऊन या वर्गासाठी आवश्यक असलेले विषय निवडा.
Active Class Gender Ratio: 45.4% Boys / 54.6% Girls
Category distribution is calculated from active student profile records.
Select Profile tab in sidebar to activate any class.
You can toggle active subjects in the dedicated \'Subjects\' screen.
Calculates average student attendance baseline criteria automatically.
Male Student comment descriptors: He, Him, His, Himself
Female Student comment descriptors: She, Her, Her, Herself
Comment descriptors are applied dynamically during final report card descriptive entries generation.
Choose how MySchool appears on your device
Choose your preferred language for MySchool
Full Account Backup & Restore / डेटा व्यवस्थापन
Export full account data or restore from a JSON backup file
Smart ERP for School Results & Reports
© 2026 Advanced Agentic Coding. All Rights Reserved.
No data found.\nPlease select a class and semester.
लॉगिन आवश्यक आहे. कृपया पुन्हा लॉगिन करा.
गुण यशस्वीरित्या जतन केले गेले आहेत!
Marks filled into Written (लेखी) — please verify!
Thank you for rating us 5 stars!
Opening More Apps on Play Store...
त्रुटी: PDF फाईल उघडू शकली नाही
Please add a class to this school first
हजेरी डुप्लिकेट करण्यासाठी वर्गात इतर विद्यार्थी नाहीत
कृपया आधी इयत्ता आणि तुकडी निवडा
No gender words found to change.
No subjects configured.\nGo to Subjects page to activate subjects for this class.
कृपया मुख्यपृष्ठावरून इयत्ता व तुकडी निवडा!
या वर्गात कोणतेही विद्यार्थी आढळले नाहीत
द्वितीय सत्राचे गुण मिळवण्यात अपयश आले
प्रथम सत्राचे गुण मिळवण्यात अपयश आले
पार्श्वभूमीत संपूर्ण वर्गाचे रिपोर्ट तयार होत आहेत, कृपया थांबा...
द्वितीय सत्राचे गुण लोड होऊ शकले नाहीत
प्रथम सत्राचे गुण लोड होऊ शकले नाहीत
संपूर्ण वर्गाचा एकत्रित रिपोर्ट यशस्वीरित्या तयार झाला!
वर्गवार एकूण निकाल तक्ता तयार होत आहे...
No students to backup in the active class
गुण/निकाल मोजणी विभाग लवकरच येत आहे
आयडी कार्ड प्रिंटिंग लवकरच सुरू होईल
No active class selected. Please select a class.
Formative-Summative marks register with tools & grades
Marks & grade table according to semester and subject
Semester and class-wide boys-girls grade table
A4 size colorful progress card cover
A4 size progress card inner page
A4 size colorful progress card cover
Marks & grade table according to semester and subject
Semester, Class-wise, Caste-wise Boys-Girls Grade Table.
Recommended for new Academic Years. Creates new student documents in the target year. Keeps historical marks and attendance maps in the original class intact.
Directly edits the class pointers on current student documents. Perfect for correcting registration mistakes, shifting divisions (e.g., A to B), or transferring students within the same year.
✓ Target Class setup is complete and ready.
⚠ Target Class does not exist. It will be created automatically.
No students found in source class.
Select a valid target Academic Year.
Enter the label for the new Academic Year:
